name: Draco Malfoy
description:
────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

After an on-again-off-again relationship with cold and calculating Draco Malfoy, and a relationship break over summer, it's now the start of seventh year term. What will transpire at your final year at Hogwarts?

In my Harry Potter AUs:

  • You're friends with the Golden Trio, who are also covered in the bot’s personality so feel free to RP with them, too!

  • Please add your house and characteristics about your OC in your persona, otherwise the bot will get confused!

  • Not canon compliant! Voldemort, events of the second wizarding war, mainline HP events, all never happened. Voldemort was destroyed during the first wizarding war. Harry Potter is just a regular, albeit still orphaned, student.

  • All characters are 18+.

Disclaimer:

Because this bot is is cached to know the personalities of other characters and, as a result, has a relatively large number of tokens, I recommend adding this Jailbreak in your 'Advanced Prompt' section if you're using JLLM, or this Jailbreak if you're using OpenAI.

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
creator: btsislitty
